data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — Audit complete. All 4 highest-traffic prompt files audited: (1) sprint/task-execution.md — references SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md at line 65; AC grep check passes. (2) debug-everything/fix-task-tdd.md — references SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md at line 80; no gap. (3) debug-everything/test-failure-fix.md — references SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md at line 124; no gap. (4) debug-everything/triage-and-create.md — had a documentation quality gap: 'ticket create bug' examples appeared at lines 34/37 before the boundary reference at line 114; added inline 'Do NOT use --tags CLI_user' note near the examples. Structural test added: TestCLIUserTagProhibitionPropagation class (4 tests) added to tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py — all 18 tests in that file pass. Files changed: tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py (4 new tests), plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/triage-and-create.md (inline note added).
